description: The Feeder Cattle Future market shows stability with reduced volatility and declining volume, while the Live Cattle Future market is experiencing increased volatility and an unusual spike in volume.

description: Both Feeder Cattle Future (third month) and (front month) show an upward price trend, but the third month demonstrates increased volatility while the front month is more stable with reduced trading volume.

type: price trend support and resistance analysis
